required_artifacts: fixture authorization, owner safety, cleanup, and remaining-risk records
required_coverage: P00 frozen baseline signature and P09 immutable completion evidence
explicit authorized fixture and real userData rejection
Operation/outbox transaction, idempotency, cancellation, and recovery matrix
eventbus replay, retention, cursor, slow-consumer, and resync matrix
authenticated project and Operation SSE contract matrix
renderer reconnect, dedupe, batch, snapshot resync, and cleanup matrix
P10 fixture contract and sensitive-output scan
frozen npm check and test result
forbidden_content: secrets, tokens, credentials, cookies, sessions, or Authorization values
raw stdout/stderr, command environments, terminal data, or request bodies
real Electron userData, production database, workspace, or unauthorized absolute paths
file URLs, symlinks, and unbounded evidence files
remaining_stage_risk: A blocked gate intentionally leaves P10 business writes, event service startup, and transport switching unexecuted; no verifier may treat missing evidence as success.
